name: nul_in_value
reason: U+0000 not representable losslessly in all lineages

name: nul_in_key
reason: U+0000 not representable losslessly in all lineages

name: dup_key_toplevel
reason: RFC 8259 duplicate-name behavior undefined; three-way divergence observed

name: dup_key_nested
reason: duplicate detection required at any depth

name: dup_key_escaped
reason: duplicates compare on the DECODED name

name: dup_key_in_array
reason: duplicate detection inside objects nested in arrays

name: exponent_lower
reason: exponent tokens outside plain-decimal domain

name: exponent_upper
reason: exponent tokens outside plain-decimal domain (case-insensitive)

name: exponent_tiny
reason: five-way float-format divergence observed

name: exponent_overflow
reason: overflows double; three accept/four reject divergence observed

name: int_beyond_2_53
reason: beyond IEEE-754 exact-integer range

name: neg_int_beyond_2_53
reason: beyond IEEE-754 exact-integer range

name: decimal_below_1e_minus_6
reason: RFC 8785 emits exponent form below 1e-6; outside plain-decimal domain

name: lone_high_surrogate
reason: unpaired surrogate is not a Unicode scalar value

name: leading_bom
reason: BOM is not JSON; two lineages silently skipped it

name: trailing_garbage
reason: input must be exactly one JSON document

name: two_documents
reason: input must be exactly one JSON document

name: trailing_comma
reason: not valid RFC 8259 JSON

name: empty_input
reason: input must be exactly one JSON document

name: raw_tab_in_string
reason: RFC 8259 requires control characters in strings to be escaped; three lineages accepted raw TAB

name: raw_ctrl_1e_in_string
reason: raw control byte inside string literal; escape it

name: raw_lf_in_string
reason: raw newline inside string literal; spell it as an escape

name: ctrl_between_tokens
reason: only TAB/LF/CR/space are JSON whitespace; one lineage skipped any byte <= 0x20

name: leading_zero_int
reason: RFC 8259 int part is 0 or [1-9]digits; two lineages accepted

name: neg_leading_zero_int
reason: RFC 8259 int part is 0 or [1-9]digits

name: trailing_dot_number
reason: fraction part requires at least one digit

name: number_trailing_junk
reason: trailing bytes after a bare number token

name: case_insensitive_literal
reason: literals must be spelled exactly null/true/false

name: unquoted_key
reason: object member names must be quoted strings

name: short_u_escape
reason: backslash-u requires exactly 4 hex digits

name: unknown_escape
reason: only the eight RFC 8259 escapes plus u are legal
